---
title: "style.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/calculus/style.ts"
loc: 31
complexity: 6
logic_score: 6.20
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 5.35
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `calculateStyleScore`
- `calculateStyleScore`
- `lines`
- `lengths`
- `avgLength`
- `variance`
- `stdDev`
- `symmetryScore`
- `identifiers`
- `validIdentifiers`
- `purityRatio`
- `purityScore`
- `claustrophobicPenalty`
- `blockCount`
- `uiOrderBonus`
- `adhoc`
- `baseScore`
- `finalScore`
